title: tellima heterophylla var. bolanderi
intro: Tellima heterophylla var. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's tellima, is a rare variety of the tellima plant, a flowering perennial native to the western United States. Its medicinal properties have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant's roots and leaves are known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling, fight infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Bolander's tellima can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
